libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set net.sf.ehcache.skipUpdateCheck=true before creating CacheManager/Cache instances, or use an Ehcache configuration with updateCheck=false, to avoid the built-in network update checker. If exercising Bitronix lookup, create a temp bitronix.properties with bitronix.tm.disableJmx=true and bitronix.tm.journal=null, set bitronix.tm.configuration to it for the test, then shut down TransactionManagerServices and clear the property afterward.

deterministic_setup.reason: Ehcache exposes and uses javax.transaction TransactionManager/XA APIs as provided dependencies; transaction-helper and XA coverage will not compile or run from the normal runtime dependency set alone.
Ehcache DefaultTransactionManagerLookup explicitly discovers Bitronix via bitronix.tm.TransactionManagerServices, and existing reachability metadata covers Bitronix resource registration.
Bitronix references javax.jms from an optional dependency that is not pulled transitively; native/JVM analysis of BTM resource classes can otherwise encounter missing JMS API types.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8877 [Automation] native-image run fails for net.sf.ehcache:ehcache-core:2.5.0; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Ehcache 2.5.0 adds memory-size/SizeOf code that may try agent, Unsafe, or reflective sizing; tests that use maxBytesLocalHeap or size-of internals are more native-image-sensitive and need local Gradle/native verification.
Bitronix keeps process-global transaction manager state; tests must clean it up to avoid order-dependent failures.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Ehcache-core 2.5.0 can be smoke-tested without services, but meaningful existing/native metadata coverage reaches its JTA/XA transaction integration and DefaultTransactionManagerLookup path. Those APIs are declared as provided/optional upstream, so the normal scaffold will miss required test classpath pieces.
